The walking method is a bit odd too. For $7.99 I don’t mind that I call it a loss but if it cost more I would been super disappointed in the gameplay. The speed of the attacks from them can barely keep up so most of the time you just die fast. Doesn’t help when u get shot couple times the screen dims so you can barely see and have to weirdly run to regain health so the picture brightens up and in mean time try to turn around in time and or reload before your killed. The knife is also weirdly set up on your hand and the shotgun has issues reloading at time then your dead. **Devs please add these suggestions because it will make this game the best**
Edit:
Suggestions:
-M1 Garand
-Revolver (speed loader or load bullets manually)
-Bruises (for punches)
-Eye poking
-Bone breaking (hands, legs, head, etc.)
-Breaking jaw
-More npc types
-Slow motion
-Less blood (I shot a dudes head and too much blood came out)
-Chin shotgun shot (blows their chin off, or jaw)
-If shot in chin with a pistol, blood shoots up and covers the face (blood squirts upward)
-Blood dripping down walls
-Gibs
-Machines in torture room like hard bullet (face grinder (the sander thingy in hard bullet) a full body grinder, spikes, endless pit, etc.)
-Grenades
-Organs
-Skin cutting knife (allows you to cut the skin and muscle tissue, then use a hammer to break bones, also if you break the ribs, you can rip the organs out of npcs)
-Slamming (slamming face on table, etc.)
-Drill
-Nose bleeds (like blood trail)
-Blood soaking on clothes (like blood trail)
-Ragdoll on death option (for player death)
-Breaking teeth (chipping teeth, teeth falling out) on npcs
-Option in main menu to increase your strength (really strong), to so where you can chop npc bodies in half, with maybe the small intestine coming out. Also punching through their head, body, and able to rip heads off, hearts out, eyes out, and limbs off

reviews.review_title: Please don't listen to other reviews
reviews.review_description:
I am extremely disappointed by this game, this wouldn't be worth it if it was free. This is one of the most unpolished early access games I've ever played. I encountered a bug the second I loaded in, my player model was 2 feet off where my floor was. I had to stand on my bed to fix it. Even after that, the shotgun locked into place, making it completely unable to fire correctly. 

But at least the Gore's good, right? Wrong. This game has the simplest gore system I have ever seen, games like Bonelab and even Tactical assault make this game look like it was made in a minute at most. Textures glitch off of walls, blood just seems to randomly appear, and though the death audio is good, there's like 2 sound files, making it get really old really fast.

Yes, this game could be worth it in the future. But practically any other sandbox gun game absolutely destroys this.

Not even close to worth 8$

developer_response.body: Hey, you can fix the height adjustment issue by holding down the Meta button. If you experience any graphical issues, please report it in the discord, I would appreciate that.

THESE ARE ALL OF THE THINGS I WOULD PERSONALLY LOVE TO SEE IN THIS GAME
————————————————————————
me personally I think this game has a LOT of potential especially the part where you can kill them as they run at you so here are my thoughts
                         WHAT TO ADD
————————————————————————
•Bone Breaking (This Would Be A Beautiful Touch If I Could Snap Necks)
•Make The Character A Human (It Feels Unrealistic Being A Robot)
•More Body Leaking (When I Stab Someone I Want Blood To Leak Out Of Where I Stabbed Them)
•More Weapons And Or Explosives(Revolver, Grenade, AK-74, ECT.)
•Weapon Attachments (Different Scopes, Different Magazine Types, Switches Only For Pistols But Not The Revolver I Mentioned Previously)
•A Torture Chamber (Different Ways To Torture The NPCS Including, A Face Saw Like In Hard Bullet, A Hook That You Can Swing Around, A WoodChipper Machine/Meat Grinder, Spiky Wall, Hydraulic Press Machine, ECT.)
•More Dismemberment (Like How I Mentioned With The Grenades When They Explode I Want There Limbs To Fly Everywhere)
•Organs (I Want To See A Heart, Kidneys, Brains, Popping Eyes As In I Want To Be Able To See There Eyes On The Floor After Blowing There Heads Off, ETC.)
•More NPC Models (Im Tired Of Seeing The Same People EVERYTIME, I Also Wanna See Different Clothes On Them Like Some Wear Hoodies, Jeans And Shorts While Others Dont ECT.)
•Bleeding Noses (I Want To Punch The NPCS And They Get Bloody Noses)
•More NPCS (I Dont Wanna Hear The Same Death Sounds EVERYTIME, I Wanna Hear Some Different Sounds)
•Different Levels (I Wanna See More Levels Rather Than The Same 2, Of Course I Mean The Ones Where They Shoot And Run At You Not The 7 Eleven That’s Fine)
•Different Ways To Damage The NPCS (I Wanna Also Be Able To Slice There Necks And They Bleed Out And Other Ways Like That To Damage The NPCS)
                           THANK YOU DEVS
AND I HOPE YOU TAKE MY SUGGESTIONS INTO                          
                           CONSIDERATION❕

Great game!
Not sure why it’s getting so many bad reviews, personally, I think it’s well worth the $10. The gore is solid considering the current state of the game. I do have a few suggestions, but I’m sure most other reviews have already covered the usual stuff.

I did run into a few bugs, like needing to tap menu options multiple times, NPCs zooming around like crackheads, the player being comically tall, and some lag, but to be fair, I’m running this on a potato-powered microwave (a.k.a. my Quest 2) with high gore settings.

One feature I’d really like is a pause menu. And in that pause menu, it’d be nice to toggle stuff like disappearing blood and bodies—though I get that might hit performance hard.

All in all, great game. Keep doing God’s work, dev. Cheers!

developer_response.body: I really appreciate you, thanks for this review and for the suggestions you requested.

reviews.review_description:
This game is too good to be true. I’ve been looking for standalone alternatives for blood trail and this is the best choice. 


1. The graphics are awesome
2. The gore is amazing 
3 overall the game is great!
Suggestions:
1. Breaking bones
2. A spawn gun
3. Dismemberment for knifes, and swords if you add swords in the future
4.A story mode (If you have enough time) 
5.A speedrun timer 
6.Different avatars to choose
7.More npcs
8. Organs and stuff
9. A revolver 
And I’ll write more each day!
game actually isn't bad its just extremely hard when fighting armed opponents, I also cant find the discord anymore even though I was in it

No menu button

No settings

No smooth turning for stationary players
That fixed turning gives me motion sickness.

The NPCs spawn behind you and bum rush you before you can even draw your weapon and kill you with one shot. 

I’ve played games that cost half the price tag that 
gave you more. 

Welp. I bought it. You got me. I sure hope it gets better in the next few years. I’ll return to it then.
